title: Cop fired after video shows him fatally shooting suspect
summary: A police officer was fired after video footage showed him fatally shooting an unarmed, naked, and stumbling suspect. The 27-year-old victim was pronounced dead at the scene.
line: An officer was fired for fatally shooting an unarmed, naked man, raising serious questions about police accountability.
label: filler

title: New questions raised over Anna Kepner's Carnival cruise murder
summary: New DNA evidence from an unknown male minor has surfaced in the unsolved murder case of cruise passenger Anna Kepner.
line: New DNA evidence could finally crack a cold case that's haunted investigators for years.
label: filler

title: City audit finds millions in untracked spending
summary: An audit of the city budget identified $40 million in expenditures that lacked proper documentation over three fiscal years.
line: The findings raise serious questions about how the city manages taxpayer money.
label: filler

title: Senate passes sweeping climate package
summary: The Senate approved a $369 billion climate and energy bill on a party-line vote Tuesday.
line: The vote marks a turning point in the nation's approach to climate policy.
label: filler

title: Major hospital system hit by ransomware
summary: A ransomware attack forced a 12-hospital system to divert ambulances and cancel elective surgeries for three days.
line: The outage is a wake-up call for the health care industry's cyber defenses.
label: filler

title: Fed holds interest rates steady
summary: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady at its March meeting, citing persistent inflation.
line: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady, citing persistent inflation.
label: filler
note: near-verbatim, caught by the restatement backstop

title: Knicks reach first conference finals in 25 years
summary: The New York Knicks defeated the Pacers to advance to the Eastern Conference finals for the first time since 2000.
line: A stunning run that few saw coming has electrified a fan base starved for success.
label: filler

title: Mayor orders citywide hiring freeze
summary: The mayor announced a hiring freeze across all city departments effective next month, citing a budget shortfall.
line: City departments will stop hiring new employees starting next month.
label: filler
note: paraphrase restatement above the lexical backstop, no cliché -> judge should flag restates

title: Seven states reach Colorado River water deal
summary: Seven Western states agreed to a framework reducing Colorado River water allocations starting in 2027.
line: The cuts fall hardest on farms that grow most of America's winter lettuce and broccoli.
label: good

title: US tightens export limits on advanced AI chips
summary: New federal rules expand restrictions on exporting advanced AI chips, adding more countries to the controlled list.
line: Nvidia loses access to China, which supplied roughly a quarter of its data-center revenue.
label: good

title: FDA approves new Alzheimer's treatment
summary: The FDA approved a new monoclonal antibody therapy shown to modestly slow cognitive decline in early-stage Alzheimer's.
line: About 6 million Americans live with Alzheimer's, but the drug only helps those diagnosed early.
label: good

title: Appeals court strikes down state social media law
summary: A federal appeals court ruled that a state law requiring social media platforms to carry all political speech violates the First Amendment.
line: The ruling splits with another circuit, teeing up a likely Supreme Court showdown.
label: good

title: Port workers reach tentative labor deal
summary: Dockworkers at major East Coast ports reached a tentative contract agreement, ending the threat of a strike.
line: A walkout would have stalled roughly half of US ocean imports days before the holidays.
label: good

title: Congress lets expanded child tax credit expire
summary: Lawmakers failed to renew the expanded child tax credit, which reverts to its smaller pre-2021 level.
line: The change pushes an estimated 3.7 million children back below the poverty line.
label: good

title: States clash over Colorado River cuts
summary: Seven Western states are negotiating mandatory cuts to their Colorado River water use.
line: The Colorado River supplies water to about 40 million people across seven states and Mexico, and a 1922 compact still governs how the water is divided.
label: good

title: AI startups raise record funding
summary: Venture funding for AI startups hit a record this quarter.
line: The surge in AI funding raises serious questions about whether this is a turning point or a bubble waiting to burst.
label: filler
